candidates.why: Candidate is explicitly a balancing item, not a true revenue/top-line row.

candidates.row_label: Total income Staff costs Other costs Depreciation/amortisation and impairment losses on tangible and intangible assets Total expenses
candidates.why: This appears to be the bank's total income/top-line subtotal. Its values equal Net interest income plus Non-Interest Income in the preview, making it the best available revenue proxy.

final_choice.row_label: Total income Staff costs Other costs Depreciation/amortisation and impairment losses on tangible and intangible assets Total expenses

variables.notes: Preferred candidate list only offered a balancing item. Chosen outside candidate list because the sheet appears to lack a clean standalone revenue label; this long label is the best available total income/top-line proxy for a bank. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Total income Staff costs Other costs Depreciation/amortisation and impairment losses on tangible and intangible assets Total expenses
No cost of goods sold/cost of sales concept is apparent in these banking statements; leave unmapped.

candidates.why: Core operating overhead personnel expense and clearly populated.
Explicit SG&A-related overhead component; include as stated.
Personnel-cost component, but preview is empty and may be a sub-breakdown rather than the consistently reported main line.
Semantically a strong SG&A label, but preview is empty; likely useful across some years.
Clear selling/administrative overhead component and populated.
Clear overhead component related to personnel/admin costs and populated.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A total row is visible. Selected best overhead components from the candidate list and excluded depreciation/amortization, impairments, interest, taxes, and totals.
No dedicated research and development expense line is visible.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on Liabilities to credit institutions

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on Deposits from the public
candidates.why: Specific interest expense component, but only a partial category rather than total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on Debt securities issued
candidates.why: Specific interest expense component, but only a partial category rather than total interest expense.
Specific interest expense component, but only a partial category rather than total interest expense.
Specific finance-cost component, not the comprehensive interest expense line.
Residual component only, not comprehensive.
Residual/unclear component only, not comprehensive.
Most semantically appropriate comprehensive interest expense label, even though preview values are blank.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest item; not preferred over the main interest expense label.
Balance-sheet accrual, not income-statement interest expense.

variables.notes: Used the generic income-statement label as the preferred single interest expense line. Specific component rows were not selected because XINT should be a single reported line, not a sum of components.

candidates.why: Income statement item, not book equity.

candidates.why: OCI/income statement related item, not book equity.
Not a balance-sheet equity balance and unclear.
Income statement item, not book equity.
Only one component of equity, not total owner equity.
Best match for parent/shareholders' equity and excludes non-controlling interests.

candidates.row_label: Non-controlling interests portion of equity capital
candidates.why: This is minority interest, not BE.
Includes minority interests/other capital; use only if owner equity unavailable.

variables.notes: Preferred owner/shareholder equity line to avoid double counting minority/non-controlling interests in BE.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of earnings, not balance-sheet minority interest balance.
Income statement allocation of earnings, not balance-sheet minority interest balance.

candidates.row_label: Non-controlling interests portion of equity capital
candidates.why: Direct match for balance-sheet non-controlling interests.
Label suggests minority interest, but values appear to include additional Tier 1 capital holders as well, so it is less clean than the explicit NCI line.

final_choice.row_label: Non-controlling interests portion of equity capital

variables.notes: Selected the explicit balance-sheet non-controlling interests line. Did not use 'Minority Interest' because its values appear to aggregate other capital holders as well.
